description: A passenger reports that an escalator at a train station is broken. An agent must create a maintenance ticket.

nodes.task_description: Receive a passenger report via social media about a broken escalator at a specific station.

expected_outcome.value: The agent captures the location and nature of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Create a new maintenance work order in the system.

expected_outcome.value: A new work order is created.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to the station maintenance team with a high priority.

expected_outcome.value: The correct team is assigned to fix the issue.

nodes.task_description: Post a reply on social media thanking the passenger for the report and informing them that a crew has been dispatched.

expected_outcome.value: The agent provides good customer service by closing the loop.
